summary: Completed testing of Practice Better 429 rate limiting fixes. All 8 backend tests passed. Verified: (1) Per-email 30-second booking cooldown works correctly - returns 429 on rapid retry after failed booking, (2) Cooldown message includes remaining seconds, (3) Different emails don't share cooldown, (4) Cooldown clears on successful booking (idempotency handles duplicates), (5) User lookup with + in email still works (regression check).

minor.issue: Default max_retries=2 in class but env var default is 3 (line 205 vs 237 in practice_better_v2.py). Minor inconsistency.

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ VERIFIED: Per-email 30-second booking cooldown implemented in booking.py (lines 49-50, 355-366)
✅ VERIFIED: _booking_cooldowns dict stores email -> timestamp of last attempt
✅ VERIFIED: Cooldown returns 429 with 'Please wait X seconds' message
✅ VERIFIED: Cooldown cleared on successful booking (line 445)
✅ VERIFIED: max_retries default is 2 in PracticeBetterConfig class (line 205)
✅ VERIFIED: _request() handles 429 with longer delay (10s minimum, uses Retry-After header, lines 440-450)
✅ VERIFIED: get_or_create_client() checks local cache FIRST (lines 684-689)
✅ VERIFIED: search_client_by_email() method exists (lines 629-672) and searches /consultant/records
✅ VERIFIED: On client creation failure, searches PB API for existing client (line 711)
✅ VERIFIED: Frontend retryCooldown state and countdown timer (OnboardingBooking.jsx lines 350, 366-369)
✅ VERIFIED: Confirm button disabled during cooldown showing 'Please wait (Xs)' (lines 321, 324)
✅ VERIFIED: Error banner shows 'Retry in Xs' during cooldown (lines 668-670)
✅ VERIFIED: data-testid='booking-retry-button' on Try Again button (line 673)
seed_data_creation: None - using unique test emails with timestamps
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rate limiting fixes verified: (1) Per-email 30-second cooldown prevents rapid-fire booking retries after failures, (2) Cooldown clears on successful booking (idempotency handles duplicate success), (3) PB service has max_retries=2, retry_base_delay=2.0, retry_max_delay=15.0, (4) 429 responses use 10s minimum delay with Retry-After header support, (5) get_or_create_client checks local cache first, then searches PB API on failure, (6) Frontend shows countdown timer during cooldown.

features_tested.POST /api/booking/book different emails: PASS - Not affected by other email's cooldown
